reference_answer: Tool steward Ben Ives held custody of CNC tool C-9.
Equipment clerk Alma Chen filed official tool register TR-9.
SN-9 recommended allowing supervised setup practice.
DR-9 stayed draft until the safety board acted.
Machine rule MR-4 governed lockout tools.
The safety board vote allowed only diagnostics by the tool steward and kept C-9 locked out.
IO-9 allowed diagnostics but did not authorize member operation.
MB-9 was noncontrolling because it copied DR-9 and ignored the safety board vote and CF-9.
